Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct

Class ForToWhileTransformation

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTWalker
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTVisitor
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.WhileLoopTransformation
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.ForToWhileTransformation
All Implemented Interfaces:
Visitor
public class ForToWhileTransformation extends WhileLoopTransformation
This transformation is used to transform a for-loop into a while-loop. This is done because there are some rules (invariant, induction, ...) that are only available for while-loops, not for for-loops. The transformation behaviour is very similar to the superclass' behaviour only the outermost for loop is treated slightly differently.
See Also:
